name: Dateline Resources Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 73% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1850, stop A$0.1089, target A$0.2150 (0.39:1) — then trail it.
